description: Single, well-bounded task with no role, no extended context, no multi-step workflow. The classic 'do this thing' prompt.

checks.description: Prompt names a concrete action (write, summarize, draft, generate, refactor, fix, translate, etc.) so the model knows the operation.
Subject of the task is named (a noun phrase or referent) rather than implied.
Output format is constrained (bullets, table, JSON, markdown, prose, headings).
Length is constrained (word count, sentence count, paragraph count, character cap).
Tone is named so the model can match register.
Audience is named (for engineers, for a non-technical board, for a 5-year-old, for the team, etc.).

checks.pattern: \b(please can you|i was wondering if|could you maybe|if it's not too much|i'd really appreciate)\b
checks.description: No throat-clearing meta language that wastes tokens without changing the output.
Prompt is at least 30 characters — under that we almost certainly lack a real task.

checks.pattern: \b(must|should|avoid|don't|do not|exclude|include only|limit to|no more than|at most|at least)\b
checks.description: At least one explicit constraint or guardrail.
